# Test fixtures

One line per fixture: `filename — purpose — provenance`.

- `aegis_v4_3.csv` — Aegis USDJPY v4.3 backtest CSV — TV Pepperstone export
- `guardian_gold_v5_5.csv` — Guardian Gold v5.5 backtest CSV — TV Pepperstone export
- `striker_dj30_v4_5.csv` — Striker DJ30 v4.5 backtest CSV — TV Pepperstone export
- `striker_nas100_v1.csv` — Striker NAS100 v1 backtest CSV — TV Pepperstone export
- `w19_dxtrade_fills.csv` — W19 DXTrade fills export — provenance: 2026-W19 live trading
- `w19_expected.json` — W19 acceptance test expected payload — manually curated 2026-05-09
